item.description:
The GAA @officialgaa · 28min Listen to @Galway_GAA captain Darren Morrissey discuss the @gaaleinster SHC, emerging players in Micheál Donoghue's panel, and the connection with supporters ahead of today's Pearse Stadium clash against @KilkennyCLG
https:// soundcloud.com/officialgaa/ga a-ie-interview-galway-1 … 1 909

item.title: MalachyClerkin: Malachy Clerkin @MalachyClerkin · 40min Kobe McDonald is a reminder that GAA people are every bit as selfish as pro spor
